query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(dataHora, '%Y-%m') as mes, COUNT(*) as total_vendas, MIN(dataHora) as primeira, MAX(dataHora) as ultima FROM vendas GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(dataHora, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY mes;
